subject: WM-0074 review: changes_requested
body: High: borrowed-shadow compiled row validation does not protect the reviewed M4 rule basis. createM5BorrowedShadowAnomalyDefinition emits the correct M4 minActivationScore, evidence mask and non-combat mask, but loadCompiledRoster accepts a core.anomaly.borrowed_shadow.v1 row with minActivationScore=0, evidenceClassMask=0, nonCombatResolutionMask=0, or schemaVersion=2 and publishes it as owner state. validateDefinition only checks generic positive/range fields plus ruleComponent/activationPolicy/stateOwnerKind for borrowed shadow. This violates WM-0074 acceptance that the borrowed-shadow lift preserve M4 behavior/owner boundaries and that roster rows are validated immutable rule inputs. Also reject duplicate defIds across all roster rows; current validateRoster only detects duplicate borrowed-shadow ids and accepts duplicate future def ids, undermining stable def id/DefIndex ownership. Add focused regressions for tampered borrowed-shadow thresholds/masks/schema and all-def duplicate ids.
